name: Albuquerque Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Corn cut from the cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 5-6 quart pan over medium heat.
2. Add corn and garlic; cook, stirring until the corn is hot and darker golden (about 2 minutes).
3. Remove from heat. Whirl broth and 2 cups of the corn in a blender or food processor until pureed; return to pan.
4. Stir in milk, oregano, and chiles. Bring to a boil, stirring over medium heat.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in cheese. Season to taste with salt.
6. Enjoy. Makes 6 servings.
